productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Purple Wallet
description: High on practicality and style, this wallet from lino perros comes with loads of space to hold your cards and your money safe. The clutch-styled closure on the inside adds zing to the otherwise boring wallet style.Made of leather with a flower embossed on the upper of the flapFlap has a clasp button closure with card slots and a transparent slot on the insideMain compartment has organiser pouches with one clutch-styled compartmentSix organiser pouches on the front that is covered by the main flapCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
